name: Marco Bernasconi
brief: We're a married couple living in Winterthur. I (Marco) work as a project manager at ABB in Baden. My wife Laura works part-time (60%) as a physiotherapist at Universitätsspital Zürich. We have two kids — Sofia (7) and Luca (3). Luca goes to KiTa. We own our apartment and have a mortgage. I'm not sure we're claiming everything we can.
